overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city street from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves steadily along a median divider surrounded by futuristic vehicles and towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards, eventually circling a distinctive red-leaved tree. The scene features an overcast, hazy atmosphere with neon advertisements illuminating the wet concrete surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street median with heavy traffic

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete median divider, observing the surrounding traffic and towering buildings

entered.detail: Tall dark skyscraper with illuminated 'TsSys' logo near the top, featuring multiple digital advertisements on its facade
Elevated pedestrian bridge crossing over the street with attached digital billboards on its sides
Numerous large glowing advertisement screens covering the surrounding buildings and bridge structures
Raised concrete divider with metal railings separating the traffic lanes, featuring small planters with vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked futuristic city street, moving along a concrete median. The TsSys building dominates the left skyline while an overhead walkway bridge looms ahead. Futuristic vehicles pass by on both sides, and the wet surfaces reflect the glow of numerous digital billboards covering the surrounding architecture.

events.description: passes underneath the elevated walkway bridge, entering a partially covered area

agents.ego_description: continuing forward beneath the overpass, passing close to a large concrete support pillar

notable_agents.action: futuristic red sports car driving past on the right side of the median

entered.detail: Large digital screen mounted on the concrete pillar displaying 'BRAIN WORM' advertisement with anime-style character
Massive structural support column for the overhead walkway, featuring yellow safety markings at its base
Distinctive tree with bright red foliage visible in the distance, standing in a raised planter

segments.scene_description: The camera moves underneath the elevated walkway bridge, passing a massive concrete pillar with a prominent 'Brain Worm' digital billboard. The TsSys building recedes behind as a distinctive red-leaved tree comes into view ahead on the right. The environment becomes slightly more enclosed under the bridge structure while traffic continues to flow on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street median approaching landmark tree

events.description: slight turn to the right while approaching the red-leaved tree

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distinctive red tree, adjusting path slightly to approach it

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area under the bridge, the camera approaches the distinctive red-leaved tree that dominates the median ahead. The Brain Worm billboard and concrete pillar fall behind as the tree grows larger in the frame. The surrounding cityscape continues to feature towering buildings with glowing advertisements while futuristic cars navigate the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: landmark tree with integrated digital display

events.description: begins circling around the red-leaved tree to view it from multiple angles

agents.ego_description: circling around the base of the red tree, examining the digital billboard wrapped around its planter

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past closely on the left side

entered.detail: Low digital advertisement display wrapped around the tree's concrete planter base, showing a character with hearts

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the distinctive red-leaved tree, revealing a digital billboard integrated into its base planter. The tree's twisted trunk and vibrant foliage are examined up close as the camera moves around it. After circling, the camera continues past the tree, with the overhead bridge now visible in the distance to the left, while traffic continues to flow through the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked futuristic thoroughfare that transitions from a wide urban canyon into an intimate encounter with a solitary piece of nature. It begins by gliding along a concrete median beneath the towering TsSys building, where wet surfaces reflect the neon glow of digital billboards as futuristic vehicles stream past. As the camera moves forward, the scene becomes momentarily enclosed while passing under an elevated walkway bridge and a massive concrete pillar featuring a Brain Worm advertisement. The environment then opens up again as the camera approaches a distinctive red-leaved tree, leaving the bridge structure behind to focus on the vibrant foliage and a digital billboard integrated into the tree's planter. Finally, the camera circles the twisted trunk of the tree before continuing forward, leaving the red leaves and the distant bridge to recede into the hazy, advertisement-lit cityscape.
